_readme: Single source of truth for the project-specific values baked into this template. 'values' holds the CURRENT values (template defaults until you initialize). Run scripts/Initialize-Template.ps1 (or the 'bc-init' Copilot agent) to replace them across the repo and rewrite this file with your choices. 'tokens' documents what each value means and where it appears.

models._readme: Model assigned to each agent's frontmatter 'model:' field. Each value MUST match a name in your Copilot model picker exactly (e.g. 'Claude Sonnet 4.6', 'Claude Opus 4.8', 'GPT-5.5'). Some environments need a ' (copilot)' suffix — add it if VS Code flags the model as unknown. Run scripts/Initialize-Template.ps1 or the 'bc-init' agent to write these into .github/agents/*.agent.md.

tokens.appPrefix: BC partner/app object-name prefix. Appears in AL object names ('ABC Payment ...'), identifiers, file names, app.json publisher-style prefix, instructions and docs.
tokens.ticketPrefix: Work-item / spec key used in 'PREFIX-123' references and 'specs/PREFIX-{ID}-*' folders. Often equal to appPrefix but can differ (e.g. ADO project key).
tokens.appName: Display name of the sample AL extension (app.json 'name').
tokens.objectIdFrom: Lower bound of your assigned AL object ID range. The initializer shifts every sample object ID by (new from - old from).
tokens.objectIdTo: Upper bound of your assigned AL object ID range.
tokens.repoSlug: GitHub 'owner/repo' slug. Appears in app.json url, issue-template config, docs.
tokens.adoOrg: Azure DevOps organization name (used by .vscode/mcp.json and docs).
tokens.workItemSystem: 'ADO' or 'GitHub'. When 'GitHub', the initializer converts ADO 'AB#123' commit-linking syntax to GitHub '#123'.
tokens.branchingStrategy: Identifier for the branching model documented in docs/branching-strategy.md. Default 'feature-release-selective'.
tokens.environments: Ordered list of BC environment names referenced by the deploy workflow (default TEST -> PROD).
tokens.bcVersion: Target Business Central version for the sample AL app. 'application'/'platform' are app.json minimums (e.g. '28.0.0.0' for 2026 wave 1) and 'runtime' is the AL runtime (e.g. '16.0'). The initializer writes these into app/app.json and test/app.json. Symbols are pulled from the public MSSymbolsV2 feed (see docs/al-agent-tools.md). Bump these when you move to a newer BC release.
tokens.bcQuality: Optional Microsoft BCQuality knowledge base (https://github.com/microsoft/BCQuality) used to back AL review. 'enabled' on/off; 'mode' is 'vendor' (tracked copy in this repo) or 'submodule'; 'path' is the checkout folder. Run scripts/Add-BCQuality.ps1 to fetch it. See docs/bcquality.md.

modelsToken: The 'models' object maps each agent file name (without .agent.md) to the model written into its 'model:' frontmatter line. Edit values here, then re-run the initializer to apply them across .github/agents/.
